notes: Detected 1 break(s) by ratio thresholds; sample: 2014-01-02(r=0.249); hi=1.8, lo=0.555556.
Computed forward_mdd_clean by excluding windows impacted by detected breaks (no price adjustment).
forward_mdd_raw_20D min=-0.7628 < threshold(-0.4); see raw min_audit_trail.
Primary forward_mdd uses CLEAN; raw outlier windows excluded by break mask.

meta.note: condition evaluated at entry t using bb_z[t]; stats computed on already-produced forward_mdd arrays (respecting raw/clean masks).

adjclose_audit_policy.note: Evidence-only; does not alter short-circuit rules. Use DQ flags/notes to interpret.

unconditional_tranche_levels.note: levels derived from unconditional forward_mdd quantiles; not conditioned on current state

window_note.note: pct_change needs D-1 close; with backfill_limit=252, max pct_change points are typically <=251.
amplitude_pct needs high/low + D-1 close; if OHLC missing, series is sparse and windows may be incomplete.
